---
title: "Audio Notes"
---

## Presentations

| Topic | Notes (read / print) | Slides (present) |
|-------|----------------------|------------------|
| PA signal flow | [pa-system.html](pa-system.html) | [pa-system-slides.html](pa-system-slides.html) |
| Midas DP48 | [dp48.html](dp48.html) | N/A |

The notes page includes an **Other formats** link to the slideshow (built-in when you use [multi-format](https://quarto.org/docs/output-formats/html-multi-format.html)).
